creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
I submitted several perl ports on the same day in a short amount of time using p5-Net-LDAP-Makepath as prototype for the rest as it was the first one written. I noticed I forgot to change the path for it.

How-To-Repeat: 

1: Check and see that it points to Net::LDAP::Makepath
2:
3: Apply diff and see that it now points to ZConf.
